name: MobileIron, Inc.
description: MobileIron, Inc. was an American software company that specialized in unified endpoint management and enterprise mobility management. Founded in 2007, the company provided a mobile-centric, zero-trust security platform designed to help enterprises manage and secure mobile applications, content, and devices. By leveraging a 'never trust, always verify' model, MobileIron enabled organizations to protect data across perimeter-less enterprise environments. In 2020, the company was acquired by Ivanti, integrating its mobile security solutions into Ivanti's broader portfolio of IT and security management software.
